subject: fix(mobile): touch targets, responsive chart, SafeAreaView consistency
body:
StationMarker: minHeight 28 → 44 to meet WCAG AA 44x44px touch target.

Admin action buttons: added explicit minHeight: 44 for reliable touch
target sizing across font scaling levels.

PriceHistoryChart: replaced hardcoded 160px height with responsive
calculation (22% of screen height, clamped 120-160px) using
useWindowDimensions. Prevents chart from consuming 28% of iPhone SE.

Admin login: wrapped KeyboardAvoidingView in SafeAreaView for
consistent notch/inset handling on all admin screens.

Tags: mobile, ux, accessibility, wcag, responsive
Complexity: 2
Urgency: 2
Impact: user-facing
Risk: low
Debt: paid
Epic: mobile-ux
Semver: patch
